programme.desc: Coverage from the women's singles final, which take place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. America's Coco Gauff claimed just her second ever Major title last year after she beat Belarus' Aryna Sabalenka 6-7, 6-2, 6-4 in the final. That ended her two-year wait for a Major after her first at the US Open back in 2023. Sabalenka missed out on her fourth Grand Slam title but did go on to win the US Open later on in 2025.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Coverage from the men's singles final, which take place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. Last year's final saw Spain's Carlos Alcaraz fight back from two sets down to beat Jannik Sinner and claim his second successive French Open title. Sinner had won the first two sets 6-4 and 7-6 but the tide turned in the third set as Alcaraz won 6-4. The final two sets both went to tie-breaks before the Spaniard won them to win his fifth Major title.

programme.sub-title: India v Afghanistan-Test Match, Day One
programme.desc: India v Afghanistan. Coverage of the first day of the one-off Test from Maharaja Yadavindra Singh PCA Stadium in Punjab. This is the first meeting between these two sides in this format since 2018 and only the second ever Test match involving the teams. The last meeting saw India make 474 in their only innings, before they bowled Afghanistan out for 109. The visitors then followed on and were bowled out for just 103 as India won by an innings and 262 runs.
